name: Atul Gupta
title: Assistant Professor of Health Care Management
relevance: Published landmark 2021 NBER paper on PE ownership of nursing homes and patient welfare. Our dataset directly extends his research with current data and ownership classification.
source: Wharton faculty page, NBER working paper #28474
notes: His paper found PE-owned nursing homes had 10% higher mortality. Our tool automates the PE classification he did manually.

name: Sabrina Howell
title: Associate Professor of Finance
relevance: Researches PE ownership effects across industries including healthcare. Has NBER affiliations and frequently uses provider-level CMS data.
notes: Co-authored multiple papers on PE effects on service quality

name: Jordan Rau
title: Senior Correspondent
organization: KFF Health News (formerly Kaiser Health News)
relevance: Covers nursing home quality extensively. Regularly writes data-driven stories about CMS inspection data, penalties, and ownership. Our cross-linked dataset is exactly what he needs.
notes: Has written about ProPublica Nursing Home Inspect limitations. Our tool fills gaps he's identified.

name: Jessica Silver-Greenberg
title: Investigative Reporter
relevance: Wrote multiple NYT investigations on PE-owned nursing homes. Cross-linked ownership + quality data enables the stories she writes.
source: NYT bylines on nursing home investigations
notes: 2022 NYT series on Clover Health and nursing home ownership

name: Richard Mollot
title: Executive Director
relevance: LTCCC is the premier nursing home consumer advocacy org. They manually track CMS data for policy advocacy. Our tool automates their workflow.
notes: Regularly testifies before Congress on nursing home quality using CMS data

name: Lois Uttley
title: National Consumer Voice for Quality Long-Term Care
relevance: National advocacy org for nursing home residents. Would use ownership tracking and penalty data for policy campaigns.
notes: Works closely with LTCCC and state ombudsman programs

name: Data Products Team
title: Definitive Healthcare
relevance: Enterprise healthcare data company. Our project demonstrates ability to build exactly what they sell (at six-figure prices). Shows Nathan can build healthcare data products.
notes: They charge $100K+ for similar data. Nathan's free version demonstrates capability.

name: Priya Bathija
title: VP, Policy
relevance: AHCA represents nursing home operators. They need facility-level quality benchmarking data that our tool provides.
notes: Industry trade group — interested in quality comparison tools for member facilities

name: David Grabowski
title: Professor of Health Care Policy
relevance: Leading researcher on nursing home economics and PE ownership effects. Published extensively in NEJM, Health Affairs on nursing home quality.
notes: His research group could use our automated PE classification and cross-linked dataset

name: Ashvin Gandhi
title: Assistant Professor
relevance: Published 2023 paper on PE ownership and nursing home quality in Management Science. Uses similar CMS datasets that our tool aggregates.
source: UCLA Anderson faculty page, Management Science publication
notes: Paper: 'Private Equity and the Provision of Health Care Services'

name: Charlene Harrington
title: Professor Emerita
relevance: Decades of research on nursing home staffing and quality. Pioneer in connecting staffing levels to patient outcomes using CMS data.
notes: Her work directly informs the staffing analysis section of our dashboard

name: Sabra Health Care REIT
title: Investor Relations
relevance: Major healthcare REIT that owns/leases nursing home properties. Needs facility-level quality data for portfolio monitoring.
notes: Would use our data for due diligence on potential acquisitions and portfolio quality monitoring

name: Rob Gillette
title: CEO
relevance: Consulting firm specializing in post-acute care management. Needs quality benchmarking and competitive analysis data.
notes: Consulting clients include nursing home chains who need quality benchmarking

name: Eric Carlson
title: Directing Attorney
relevance: Legal advocacy org. Uses CMS data for litigation and policy advocacy on nursing home quality. Our penalty tracking is directly relevant.
notes: Works on elder law and nursing home enforcement cases

name: Fred Bentley
title: Managing Director
relevance: Healthcare analytics consulting firm. Our project demonstrates Nathan's ability to build healthcare data products. Shows data engineering + domain expertise.
notes: Avalere advises healthcare investors and payers on quality data

name: Fabian Pfeffer
title: Associate Professor of Sociology
relevance: Studies wealth inequality and institutional care. Our PE-ownership data connects to his inequality research agenda.
notes: Cross-disciplinary angle: PE ownership → inequality → care quality
